response.original_title: David's Lab: Last Signs of Life
response.overview: In this short sequel to Alien: Covenant, an astronaut-detective connects the dots of what went on in David's lab on Paradise, going further under the skin of the Xenomorph than any Weyland-Yutani employee before him.
response.tagline: A team from Weyland-Yutani arrives on Planet 4, and one of the explorers enters David's laboratory to document the rogue synthetic's scientific discoveries.
response.title: David's Lab: Last Signs of Life
